subject: Testing: Manual QA test plan
description:
Create and execute manual test plan for interactive prompts in real goyoke TUI.

Dependencies: Tasks 9-13 complete (implementation done)

Test plan:
1. **AskUserQuestion tests:**
   - Simple choice (2 options)
   - Complex choice (4 options)
   - Multi-select (if supported)
   - Rapid selection
   - Cancellation

2. **Plan mode tests:**
   - Enter plan mode
   - Review generated plan
   - Approve plan
   - Reject plan
   - Cancel plan mode

3. **Permission toggle tests:**
   - Start in interactive mode
   - Switch to auto mode
   - Verify tools work without prompts
   - Switch back to interactive
   - Verify prompts return

4. **Edge cases:**
   - Timeout handling
   - Multiple prompts in sequence
   - Prompt during tool execution
   - Restart during prompt

Deliverable:
- Test plan document (MANUAL_TEST_PLAN.md)
- Test execution report with screenshots/recordings
- Bug report for any issues found

Acceptance:
- [ ] All test scenarios executed
- [ ] Results documented
- [ ] Screenshots/recordings captured
- [ ] Bugs filed (if any)
- [ ] Sign-off from user (you!)
